title: The next era of AI coding
summary: Michael Truell describes a shift in software engineering where autonomous agents generate code end-to-end and engineers become agent managers. He cites data showing 30% of Cursor PRs are fully agent-developed, enterprise code went from 15% to 75% AI-generated in a year, and agents can build complex systems with minimal human involvement.
